segments.text: spake unto Moses and Aaron in the land of Egypt
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: This month shall be unto you the beginning of months: it shall be the first month of the year to you
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Speak ye unto all the congregation of Israel, saying, In the tenth day of this month they shall take to them every man a lamb, according to the house of their fathers, a lamb for an house
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Instructions for households too small for a lamb
Your lamb shall be without blemish, a male of the first year: ye shall take it out from the sheep, or from the goats
segments.speaker: The LORD

footnotes: of…: Heb. son of a year

segments.text: ye shall keep it up until the fourteenth day of the same month: and the whole assembly of the congregation of Israel shall kill it in the evening
segments.speaker: The LORD

footnotes: in…: Heb. between the two evenings

segments.text: And thus shall ye eat it; with your loins girded, your shoes on your feet, and your staff in your hand; and ye shall eat it in haste: it is the LORD's passover
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: For I will pass through the land of Egypt this night, and will smite all the firstborn in the land of Egypt, both man and beast; and against all the gods of Egypt I will execute judgment: I am the LORD
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Then Moses called for all the elders of Israel
Draw out and take you a lamb according to your families, and kill the passover
segments.speaker: Moses

segments.text: It is the sacrifice of the LORD's passover, who passed over the houses of the children of Israel in Egypt, when he smote the Egyptians, and delivered our houses
segments.speaker: Moses

segments.text: And the people bowed the head and worshipped
And he called for Moses and Aaron by night
Rise up, and get you forth from among my people, both ye and the children of Israel; and go, serve the LORD, as ye have said
segments.speaker: Pharaoh

segments.text: This is the ordinance of the passover: There shall no stranger eat thereof
segments.speaker: The LORD
